title: Parkour Mod
description: This mod adds various parkour blocks
body: Parkour Mod --- [Parkour Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/Yk5GUpV9) adds many different blocks, that can all be obtained in survival, designed to help with making fun parkour maps! # Features: ## Super Up Item Gives Jump Boost II when eaten! Great for bigger jumps! ## Rubber Block Throws you up into the air and when you land on it you take no damage! ## Gel Block You take no damage when you land on it
